subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my exalted Lord, in all conditions, inasmuch as Thou hast abolished the decree of contention and ordained the victory of Thy Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا ربی المتعال فیکل الاحوال و بما رفعت حکم الجدال و قدرت نصره امرک
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
